title: vitis roxburghii
intro: Vitis roxburghii, also known as David's grape or Chinese wild grape, is a species of grapevine native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Vitis roxburghii include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be obtained from various health food stores and online retailers.
